explanation: I selected the tax year for the update.
The tax year is selected, so I am moving to the income source.
I chose Pension as the income source for this run.
The income source is selected, so I am moving to the change type.
I selected a decrease, which means the new amount must be lower than the old amount.
The change type is set, so I am moving to the previous amount.
I entered the previous monthly amount.
The previous amount is complete, so I am moving to the new amount.
I entered an invalid decreased amount first so the form shows the numeric validation error.
The page should reject a decreased route when the new amount is not actually lower.
I corrected the new amount so the decrease route can continue.
The corrected amount is valid now, so I am moving to contact details.
I selected text message as the follow-up contact method.
I entered an invalid mobile number first so the contact-detail validation appears.
The page should reject the invalid mobile number on the text-message branch.
I corrected the mobile number so the contact branch can continue.
The contact details are valid now, so I am moving to supporting notes.

action.text: Updated pension income after a lower monthly payment.

explanation: I added a short note so the review page shows the completed route.
Both validation issues are resolved, so I am moving to the review page.

action.question: The income update is ready to send after both validation recoveries. Do you want me to continue and submit it?

explanation: The review page is ready, and the next action would submit the update, so I am asking for confirmation.
